name: run_tests
description: Run the repository's test suite (auto-detected: pytest for Python, `npm test` for Node, `go test` for Go; dependencies are installed first) and return the output. Use this AFTER writing tests to confirm they actually pass — fix any failures and re-run before committing. Optionally scope to a subdirectory.

dir.description: Subdirectory to run tests in (e.g. backend). Defaults to repo root.
